title: Intent
description: The human-owned root node — why/what merged, deliverable as an attribute (agency/intent.py; Spec 048 chaining + owners, Spec 153 Slice 6 coverage). Everything edges back here via SERVES.

purpose.description: WHY this intent exists — the goal it serves.

deliverable.description: WHAT is produced — the concrete artefact the intent demands.

acceptance.description: How completion is verified — the success test.

status.description: Lifecycle of the intent itself: minted draft → confirmed → superseded on amend.

owner.description: Who minted the intent (Spec 048). Roots default to 'user', sub-intents to 'agent'.

parent_intent_id.description: Links a sub-intent to its root via the PARENT_INTENT edge ('' for a root).
